name: inverter_3ph_voc_aho_grid_loadstep_template
design_prompt: Design a grid-forming 3-phase inverter controller using AHO-based VOC for weak-grid operation with load-step robustness, inrush limiting, and safe transient behavior.
control_design_notes: Prioritize AHO-based VOC grid-forming stability. Use AHO-based VOC instead of VSG when possible. Keep an inner dq current loop and active current limiting during load steps and grid connection.
